data.body:
Gerrit landing started. Rebased stack onto Gerrit main 41029aa1e (GitHub mirror lagged). Created server-side branch feature/grounding-t2. Pushed 3 stories for review INTO the feature branch:
- change 260 = S1 ADR (0325a80)
- change 261 = S2 seam (807112b)
- change 262 = S3 pyright (709a46e)
Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified bot votes on each; then submit each into the feature branch, then --no-ff merge-back to main. JoeOakhartNava confirmed in feature-branch-drivers.
